name: warp-mcp
description: SIP trunking, numbers, porting, messaging, billing, and CDR analytics on the Ringer WARP platform
long_description: Gives AI agents full access to the WARP Customer API: provision SIP trunks and credentials, search and order phone numbers, run port-in requests end to end, register 10DLC brands and campaigns and send messages, check balances and invoices, and analyze call detail records.

api_token.title: WARP API Key
api_token.description: Your WARP API key (rk_...) — minted in the WARP portal at https://warp.ringer.tel under Settings → API Keys
